aligned_lyrics.text: Hey, it’s him again, and last night Son
Tung M-TP released Come My Way, and per
haps Vietnam owes him a deep thank you
If this song succeeds internationally,
it could become a massive gateway for
Vietnamese culture to step onto the glo
bal stage. When music leads the way,
tourism, cuisine, fashion, and many
other values of the country will also
have the opportunity to be seen more
The most interesting part is that this
could become a beautiful example of
combining East and West while preser
ving a unique identity. Once that door
is opened, opportunities for other Viet
namese artists to enter the intern
ational market will also become wider
and easier
Tung is not just making music: he is
trying to paint a new trend, a new
direction for Vietnamese music. And
whatever the final result may be, just
having the courage to try is already
worth appreciating
Thank you Tung, and ❤ you
